meta_notes: News scan ran in full (4 searches) — everything found was a recap or stale-by-story (SkinStylus ICYMI; late-June sunscreen-paradox wave, already saturated in-feed); empty news shelf is deliberate, not a time cut. more_stitches extended past soft cap (11) to honor the virality guarantee; 3 are unidentifiable-content stubs (no caption in feed). Diaper-cream corpus transcripts conflict on one sentence (2.4M stitch reads 'not the best' — playbook confirms contrarian; Jan-2026 YT reads 'is the best') — position quoted from the unambiguous $10-staples video instead. No time-budget cuts.

stitch_shortlist.author: @ciaransmythe
stitch_shortlist.claim: Diaper rash cream is the ultimate sunscreen

pitch.the_claim: Diaper rash cream works as sunscreen — ‘the ultimate sunscreen you’ve never heard of’
pitch.why_it_stitches: 1.15M + 1,980 comments and a LIVE derm-vs-derm feud (Dr Dray’s 391K ♥ rebuttal is a 3% breakout; Lab Muffin adjudicating at 404 comments) — and SHE is the internet’s diaper-cream dermatologist; miss recorded: 6.3d, no longer rising, but the feud still is
pitch.your_fit: Her franchise: 2.4M contrarian stitch, 1.8M TT, 875K YT short — corpus: zinc diaper creams help rashes (poison ivy, sunburn, perioral dermatitis), nobody in the corpus calls them sunscreen. NOTE: transcripts conflict on one sentence (‘is/is not the best for barrier repair’) — watch her 2.4M stitch before filming. A repeat needs the NEW angle: the feud verdict
angles: ‘You want me to WHAT?’ — sunscreen it is NOT; barrier it IS
Settle the feud: what zinc % actually means for UV
Empathy-first: why we all want one cream that does everything
